## Debug Output

For CLI issues, re-run the command with the `--debug` flag and paste the relevant output below:

```
scion <command> --debug
```

<details>
<summary>Debug output</summary>

```
(paste output here)
```

</details>

```
(paste logs here)
```

</details>
